source_jobs.title: Onboarding Manager
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT MANGOMINT

Mangomint https://www.mangomint.com/ is a fast-growing SaaS company on a mission to make every salon and spa more profitable. We are already the highest-rated https://www.capterra.com/sem-compare/salon-software/?utm_source=ps-google&utm_medium=ppc&utm_campaign=:1:CAP:2:COM:3:All:4:US:5:BAU:6:SOF:7:Desktop:8:BR:9:Salon&network=g&gclid=Cj0KCQjwo8S3BhDeARIsAFRmkONzVqpXcRTd9U5SXUn9GsHMtwaiuBTx_Q2xJqx5-7KvYJTvGVmnrn8aAu9KEALw_wcB salon and spa software in the US and Canada with thousands of customers and seek to become the #1 market leader in the coming years.

We’re a primarily remote company, ambitious, and collaborative team https://www.glassdoor.com/Overview/Working-at-Mangomint-EI_IE2539548.11,20.htm that gathers together every few months. As we grow, we’re looking to attract high-potential individuals who want to be part of a winning team. If that’s you, come join us https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/mangomint!






ABOUT THE ROLE

As an Onboarding Manager at Mangomint, you'll guide beauty and wellness business owners through their software transition, serving as their accountability partner during a critical 2-3 week implementation period. You'll own a pipeline of 25-30 new accounts monthly, directly impacting our mission to make every salon and spa more profitable.



As an Onboarding Manager at Mangomint, you will…

 - Guide customers through the adoption of Mangomint by managing their onboarding journey, documenting goals, providing product training via virtual meetings, and configuring their accounts for a smooth rollout

 - Leverage beauty/wellness industry knowledge to provide relevant guidance and build credibility with business owners

 - Identify and focus on accounts showing clear activation potential, investing energy where there's highest engagement

 - Connect Mangomint features directly to customer pain points and business goals

 - Confidently position Mangomint Payment Processing as a core part of activation, connecting it directly to customer business goals

 - Create tailored onboarding plans that prioritize the most valuable features first

 - Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including engineering, product, sales, and marketing, to continuously improve the onboarding experience and address customer feedback




WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 3+ years of experience in a customer-facing role such as onboarding, implementation, customer success, account management, or consultative sales

 - Prior experience in the beauty/wellness industry or experience supporting service-based small businesses is strongly preferred

 - Comfortable working in a metrics-driven environment and owning outcomes tied to activation, adoption, and customer success

 - Proven ability to manage multiple customer onboarding projects simultaneously and keep timelines, follow-ups, and internal coordination on track

 - Strong written and verbal communication skills, including the ability to confidently set expectations, navigate difficult conversations, and build trusted customer relationships

 - Proactive and solutions-oriented, with strong problem-solving skills and a high level of ownership and accountability

 - Tech savvy- comfortable with Salesforce, Slack, text messaging, video calls, and multiple communication platforms, plus the ability to master new software and teach complex concepts to business owners




WHAT YOU'LL LOVE ABOUT US

 - Health, dental, vision, life & LTD insurance

 - Generous monthly wellness budget for gym memberships, yoga, etc.

 - Premium subscription to the Calm https://www.calm.com/?pid=googleadwords_int&af_channel=googlesem&af_c_id=14668023573&af_adset_id=136070395885&af_ad_id=603377958418&af_siteid=g&af_sub_siteid=&af_keyword=kwd-316578326783&af_sub3=c&af_sub4=Cj0KCQiAkMGcBhCSARIsAIW6d0COoPkg49T2ESdqQlUlpJIF4KxYkRluepIYfFEFcGjSwxu10SAfBhoaAvuGEALw_wcB&utm_medium=paid&utm_source=googlesem&utm_campaign=14668023573&utm_content=homepage&utm_term=kwd-316578326783&gclid=Cj0KCQiAkMGcBhCSARIsAIW6d

source_jobs.title: GTM Lead
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT MANGOMINT

Mangomint https://www.mangomint.com/ is a fast-growing SaaS company on a mission to make every salon and spa more profitable. We are already the highest-rated https://www.capterra.com/sem-compare/salon-software/?utm_source=ps-google&utm_medium=ppc&utm_campaign=:1:CAP:2:COM:3:All:4:US:5:BAU:6:SOF:7:Desktop:8:BR:9:Salon&network=g&gclid=Cj0KCQjwo8S3BhDeARIsAFRmkONzVqpXcRTd9U5SXUn9GsHMtwaiuBTx_Q2xJqx5-7KvYJTvGVmnrn8aAu9KEALw_wcB salon and spa software in the US and Canada with thousands of customers and seek to become the #1 market leader in the coming years.

We’re a primarily remote company, ambitious, and collaborative team https://www.glassdoor.com/Overview/Working-at-Mangomint-EI_IE2539548.11,20.htm that gathers together every few months. As we grow, we’re looking to attract high-potential individuals who want to be part of a winning team. If that’s you, come join us https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/mangomint!






ABOUT THE ROLE:

As the founding member of a new team at Mangomint, you'll own the launch of an exciting new product, from selling and onboarding to supporting customers once they're up and running. This is a ground-floor opportunity to own the customer relationship end to end, from first conversation through setup, adoption, and ongoing support.

You'll guide interested customers through a largely self-serve product experience, stepping in wherever they need you, and you'll be close to the customer in a way few roles are. Because this is a brand-new motion, there's no finished playbook, you'll help write it.

Note: This is an individual contributor role, not a people management position. As the founding member of this team, you'll operate with a high degree of ownership and autonomy while helping define the playbook, shape the customer journey, and lay the foundation for how this function grows over time.

In this role you will:

 - Sell an exciting new product to customers, guiding them through a largely self-serve experience

 - Onboard new customers and help them get the most out of the product

 - Answer questions, overcome objections, and provide ongoing support once customers are up and running

 - Own the customer relationship end to end, from first conversation through adoption

 - Surface what customers want and where they get stuck

 - Work directly with our engineers to shape what gets built next

 - Help define the motion from the ground up, building the playbook as you go






WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

 - Experience working in a SaaS company, ideally in a customer-facing role where you've sold to, onboarded, or supported customers

 - Experience in a startup or other fast-paced environment where you've had a high degree of ownership, autonomy, and cross-functional collaboration

 - A high-agency, high-drive generalist who can't help but solve the problem in front of you

 - A fast learner who's comfortable wearing many hats

 - A track record of growth wherever you've landed, your background probably doesn't fit neatly into one box, and that's the point

 - A strong understanding of sales, the customer, and the broader business, enough to operate across all of it

 - A first-principles thinker who'd rather figure it out than follow a script

 - Someone energized by ambiguity, who wants to help write the playbook rather than have one handed to them






WHAT YOU’LL LOVE ABOUT MANGOMINT

 - Health, dental, vision, life & LTD insurance

 - Generous monthly wellness budget for gym memberships, yoga, etc.

 - Premium subscription to the Calm https://www.calm.com/?pid=googleadwords_int&af_channel=googlesem&af_c_id=14668023573&af_adset_id=136070395885&af_ad_id=603377958418&af_siteid=g&af_sub_siteid=&af_keyword=kwd-316578326783&af_sub3=c&af_sub4=Cj0KCQiAkMGcBhCSARIsAIW6d0COoPkg49T2ESdqQlUlpJIF4KxYkRluepIYfFEFcGjSwxu10SAfBhoaAvuGEALw_wcB&utm_medium=paid&utm_source=googlesem&utm_campaign=14668023573&utm_content=homepage&utm_term=kwd-316578326783&gclid=Cj0KCQiAkMGcBhCSARIsAIW6d0COoPkg49T2ESdqQlUlpJIF4

source_jobs.title: DevOps Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT MANGOMINT

Mangomint https://www.mangomint.com/ is a fast-growing SaaS company on a mission to make every salon and spa more profitable. We are already the highest-rated https://www.capterra.com/sem-compare/salon-software/?utm_source=ps-google&utm_medium=ppc&utm_campaign=:1:CAP:2:COM:3:All:4:US:5:BAU:6:SOF:7:Desktop:8:BR:9:Salon&network=g&gclid=Cj0KCQjwo8S3BhDeARIsAFRmkONzVqpXcRTd9U5SXUn9GsHMtwaiuBTx_Q2xJqx5-7KvYJTvGVmnrn8aAu9KEALw_wcB salon and spa software in the US and Canada with thousands of customers and seek to become the #1 market leader in the coming years.

We’re a primarily remote company, ambitious, and collaborative team https://www.glassdoor.com/Overview/Working-at-Mangomint-EI_IE2539548.11,20.htm that gathers together every few months. As we grow, we’re looking to attract high-potential individuals who want to be part of a winning team. If that’s you, come join us https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/mangomint!






ABOUT THE ROLE

As a DevOps Engineer at Mangomint, you'll find the bottlenecks across our business and use imagination to solve them. The thinking and problem-solving is the job, not the tools. You'll be part of a DevOps team, working together on things that keep engineering moving: CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure, automation, and the integrations our teams depend on.

A big part of this role is something we're starting to call "VibeOps". Our non-engineering teams increasingly build their own apps and automations with AI assistance. You'll guide that "vibe-coded" work into production, building in the guardrails that keep it secure, stable, and reliable from the start.

Security runs through all of the work you'll do, in a hands-on, practical way. You'll harden real tools and pipelines as they ship, strengthening our DevSecOps practices across both our core systems and the VibeOps work, in a cross-functional role where you can move fast and directly cut risk.

In the DevOps Engineer role at Mangomint you will:

 - Find and remove bottlenecks across engineering and the wider business, applying DevOps and agile thinking rather than a fixed toolset

 - Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines and infrastructure-as-code that get work shipped reliably

 - Review, refactor, and harden prototype and AI-generated apps from non-engineering teams into secure, production-grade systems (core VibeOps work)

 - Add authentication, tests, dependency and secret scanning, and proper deployment paths to department-built tools before they touch real data

 - Strengthen DevSecOps practices: dependency scanning, SAST/DAST, security smell testing, and proactive vulnerability management

 - Build and maintain automations and integrations that drive efficiency across Support, Onboarding, Sales, and Engineering

 - Design and troubleshoot APIs

 - Support compliance requirements and security testing workflows

 - Partner closely with non-technical teams to understand what they've built and bring it up to standard

Technologies You Will Work With

 - Backend/API: Kotlin, Java, TypeScript, JavaScript, PostgreSQL, AWS (Lambda, SQS, RDS, EC2/EB)

 - Scripting: Python, Bash, or other scripting languages for automation

 - CI/CD & Infrastructure: AWS, pipeline tooling, infrastructure as code (exposure to Terraform or Pulumi is a plus)

 - Security & Compliance: Dependency scanning tools (e.g., Snyk, SonarQube, TruffleHog), SAST/DAST tools, SIEMs, SOC2 frameworks

 - Integration & Automation: Zapier, Pipedream, AI agent frameworks, and similar workflow tools

While experience with our exact stack is helpful, we care more about your problem-solving skills, your sense of agency, and your ability to quickly learn and adapt to new technologies.






WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - 3+ years of experience in a DevOps Engineer role

 - A demonstrated track record of solving problems holistically — finding the real bottleneck and working the problem, not reaching for a familiar tool

 - Genuine fluency in agile and DevOps ways of working, shown through ho

source_jobs.title: Business Development Representative
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT MANGOMINT

Mangomint https://www.mangomint.com/ is a fast-growing SaaS company on a mission to make every salon and spa more profitable. We are already the highest-rated https://www.capterra.com/sem-compare/salon-software/?utm_source=ps-google&utm_medium=ppc&utm_campaign=:1:CAP:2:COM:3:All:4:US:5:BAU:6:SOF:7:Desktop:8:BR:9:Salon&network=g&gclid=Cj0KCQjwo8S3BhDeARIsAFRmkONzVqpXcRTd9U5SXUn9GsHMtwaiuBTx_Q2xJqx5-7KvYJTvGVmnrn8aAu9KEALw_wcB salon and spa software in the US and Canada with thousands of customers and seek to become the #1 market leader in the coming years.

We’re a primarily remote company, ambitious, and collaborative team https://www.glassdoor.com/Overview/Working-at-Mangomint-EI_IE2539548.11,20.htm that gathers together every few months. As we grow, we’re looking to attract high-potential individuals who want to be part of a winning team. If that’s you, come join us https://jobs.ashbyhq.com/mangomint!






ABOUT THE ROLE

As a Business Development Representative (BDR) at Mangomint, you’ll play a key role in driving growth by calling and engaging with prospects. This is a great role for someone passionate about sales and ready to build a career in a dynamic environment. You’ll work closely with our sales team to help small to medium-sized salons and spas (5-50 providers) discover how Mangomint can transform their business and make them more profitable.

In this role the expectation is 100 dials and 2 meetings booked per day. Don't worry about prospecting, we will provide you with a list to work through. We do the data work for you.

If you’re someone who’s driven to succeed, empathetic towards customers’ needs and want to be part of a fast-paced, growing company, this could be the role for you.

In this role you will:

 - Contact cold leads through calling, emailing, and other outreach methods with the goal to book demos for the AE team

 - Update and manage CRM data (Salesforce)

 - Educate yourself on our prospects and understand their needs

 - Be part of a brand new team of BDRs on a mission to build out the winning formula

 - Go above and beyond delivering your quota to contribute directly to the success of the company

 - Work in-office in San Diego




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

 - You're currently located in San Diego and excited about working in-office

 - 1 year of sales experience (SMB SaaS preferred) or recent graduate

 - Proven history of personal and professional excellence

 - Commitment to professional growth and development

 - Familiarity with tools like Salesforce, Outreach and Nooks

 - Excellent communication skills and a team-oriented attitude

 - Self-motivated, resilient, and goal-driven

 - Passion for helping small businesses (experience in the salon/spa industry a plus)




WHAT YOU'LL LOVE ABOUT MANGOMINT

 - Competitive compensation

 - Employee stock options

 - Comprehensive health coverage (health, dental, vision, life & disability)

 - Generous monthly wellness budget (gym, massage, etc.)

 - Premium Calm https://www.calm.com/?pid=googleadwords_int&af_channel=googlesem&af_c_id=14668023573&af_adset_id=136070395885&af_ad_id=603377958418&af_siteid=g&af_sub_siteid=&af_keyword=kwd-316578326783&af_sub3=c&af_sub4=Cj0KCQiAkMGcBhCSARIsAIW6d0COoPkg49T2ESdqQlUlpJIF4KxYkRluepIYfFEFcGjSwxu10SAfBhoaAvuGEALw_wcB&utm_medium=paid&utm_source=googlesem&utm_campaign=14668023573&utm_content=homepage&utm_term=kwd-316578326783&gclid=Cj0KCQiAkMGcBhCSARIsAIW6d0COoPkg49T2ESdqQlUlpJIF4KxYkRluepIYfFEFcGjSwxu10SAfBhoaAvuGEALw_wcB app & One Medical https://www.onemedical.com/ membership

 - Flexible PTO

 - 401k, HSA and FSA plans available (no current match)






MANGOMINT IS AN EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER. WE DO NOT DISCRIMINATE AGAINST ANY EMPLOYEE OR JOB APPLICANT ON THE BASIS OF RACE, COLOR, RELIGION, SEX (INCLUDING PREGNANCY, SEXUAL ORIENTATION, AND GENDER IDENTITY), NATIONAL ORIGIN, AGE, DISABILITY AND GENETIC INFORMATION (INCLUDING FAMILY MEDICAL HISTORY).

notes: SaaS company with a mix of tech and non-tech roles, primarily remote
